subcodes.first_line: A Book from Our presence unto him who hath been mentioned before the Throne on most occasions, and unto whom the All-Merciful hath sent down Tablets [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا الی من ذکر لدی العرش فی اکثر الاحیان و انزل له الرحمن الواحا فی
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
